popularStory.headline: Biography of Henry FitzSiward, Lord of Lathom 1093 - 1128.
popularStory.description:
Titles
Henry was named Earl of Lathom on his 21st birthday, 27 April 1114. It was often said of him that he began the fall of the Lathom clan of the halls of power.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom於1093年4月27日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉堂姆時，他的父親Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom19歲，母親Helga de Briquessart19歲。他於1118年4月24日與Alice Woodward在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1128年6月12日在他的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom于1093年4月27日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉堂姆时，他的父亲Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom19岁，母亲Helga de Briquessart19岁。他于1118年4月24日与Alice Woodward在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1128年6月12日在他的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom was born on 27 April 1093, in Lathom, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom, was 19 and his mother, Helga de Briquessart, was 19. He married Alice Woodward on 24 April 1118, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 12 June 1128, in his hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom est né le 27 avril 1093, à Lathom, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Helga de Briquessart, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Woodward le 24 avril 1118, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1128, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom am 27. April 1093 in Lathom, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom 19 und seine Mutter Helga de Briquessart 19. Er hat am 24. April 1118 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England Alice Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Juni 1128 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom è nato il il 27 aprile 1093 nel Lathom, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Helga de Briquessart, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Woodward il 24 aprile 1118, nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 12 giugno 1128, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathomが1093年4月27日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラソムで生まれた時，父Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathomは19歳，母Helga de Briquessartは19歳であった。1118年4月24日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスでAlice Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1128年6月12日に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom(이)가 1093년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 래톰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Helga de Briquessart(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1118년 4월 24일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 Alice Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1128년 6월 12일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.27 April 1093–12 June 1128: 27 de abril de 1093–12 de junho de 1128
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom nasceu em 27 de abril de 1093, em Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Helga de Briquessart, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Woodward em 24 de abril de 1118, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1128, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom родился 27 апреля 1093 г. в местности латом, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Helga de Briquessart, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Woodward 24 апреля 1118 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 12 июня 1128 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия.

es.27 April 1093–12 June 1128: 27 de abril de 1093–12 de junio de 1128
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry FitzSiward Lord of Lathom nació el 27 de abril de 1093, en Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Helga de Briquessart, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Woodward el 24 de abril de 1118, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 12 de junio de 1128, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
